title: EcoCeres Earns ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs SAF Export Гўв‚¬Е“White ListГўв‚¬Вќ Recognition and Airworthiness Certificate, Strengthening Global Market Access and Safety Credentials
content: EcoCeres Inc. announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, ECO Biochemical Technology (Zhangjiagang) Company Limited (ECO BioTech), has been included in the official China SAF export Гўв‚¬Е“White ListГўв‚¬Вќ and awarded ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs airworthiness certificate. These recognitions confirm EcoCeresГўв‚¬в„ў compliance with aviation safety standards for both domestic and international markets, as well as the operational reliability standards set by local authorities. To date, only a handful of producers have been included in the China SAF export White List or have received ChinaГўв‚¬в„ўs airworthiness certificate Гўв‚¬вЂњ ECO BioTech proudly among them. While these qualifications are formally granted to ECO BioTech, they collectively reinforce EcoCeresГўв‚¬в„ў standing position as a trusted provider of sustainable aviation fuel solutions from Asia to the global market.
author: Analysts Account
